changes: Equipment rune choices are sorted by current-setting value diff descending.
Attack speed, skill speed, casting speed, charge speed, cooldown recovery, cooldown reduction seconds, recovery, healing received, and flat heal are excluded from damage value scoring.
Expected damage mapping now includes DB damage keys such as enemyDamagePct, damagePct, targetIncomingDamageIncreasePct, unarmoredDamagePct, strongHitDamagePct, and multiHitDamagePct.
Project documentation and GitHub Pages marker were added.

validation.numberComparison: PASS: baseline 100, utility-only rune 100, utility diff 0
validation.inverseCheck: PASS: utility-only option does not increase value; damage weapon still changes value
validation.uiCheck: PASS: static UI checks passed; browser screenshot blocked because Playwright browser executable is not installed
validation.connectionCheck: PASS: index script order and DB/core/app links verified
validation.regression: PASS: node_test, norm_test, v18, v19, v22, v23, v25, v26, v27 validations passed
